Dialogue: Wonderful! That's correct!
How about I give you a little hint?
Ah, supplies are running low again...
Let's go see the sights!
Now, now, be civil!
Forget that, I'm hungry!
I'm almost too scared to look at my fortune...
Oh, for the love of... Just look at the bleedin' thing already!
Papa! They said there'd be prizes!
I suppose we <Emphasis>could</Emphasis> give it a go together.
Hmmm...
This is tough!
この傘の丸み、いいわぁ！
What pleasing contours!
なんて丁寧な縁取り…
I think the golden trim is simply marvelous.
楽しげな模様、悪くない
I must say, they did a half-decent job with the patterns...

木材の味が生きている
匠の仕事だな…
The wood grain on the handle adds real character.

あの傘、おしゃれね…
創作意欲が湧いてくるわ
Such stylish parasols... This puts me in the mood to weave.

私に似合う素敵な傘を
作っちゃむ～ん！
Do make sure to weave one that matches my complexion! Tee hee!

妙な柄の傘だな
いや、逆にイカしてる…か？
This parasol is strange, but undeniably compelling...

お似合いでございますです
はい
You look dashing, my lord.
クエクエッ？
Kweh-kweh?

エッグハントで傘とは
おもしろいことを考えたね
These Hatching–tide parasols are positively charming.

かわいこちゃんの
傘もほしかった…！
I'd have preferred a parasol emblazoned with a flock of little darlings!

タマゴの傘が集まって
賑わっているようですね
The festivities have drawn quite the crowd.

隊長、私たちも
もらいに行きませんか？
Captain, mayhap we could avail ourselves a parasol each?

あの傘、私たちでも
製作できないものか…
Perhaps such a parasol could be forged from steel instead?
Ugh, where's <Emphasis>my</Emphasis> bouquet...
Hmph, who wants some stupid bouquet anyway!
Does the Elder Seedser like roses, I wonder...
Does the Elder Seedseer like roses, I wonder...
Here. We. Go!
The Songbirds have arrived!
The Songbirds have arrived!
Here. We. Go!
For a sweet celebration how sweetly we shall croon...
For a sweet celebration, how sweetly we shall croon...
